title: Mini-boss Boss Bars [Configuration Datapack]
description: A configuration datapack for the Mini-boss Boss Bars mod that allows you to configure whichever boss you choose to not show their boss bar.
body:
### NOTICE: Usage of the 1.20.1 version of this data pack has been deprecated due to the mod now having its own configuration file to do the job.


**This data pack is used in tandem with the ["Mini-boss Boss Bars"](https://modrinth.com/mod/mini-boss-boss-bars) mod and allows the user to configure whichever boss they want to restrict from showing health bars at the top of the screen.**


# Instructions:

1. Navigate to "data > minibossbossbarsconfig_disable > functions" and search for the .mcfunction file with name of the mod containing the boss you are looking for. Open that .mcfunction file and proceed to the next step.
(The Elder Guardian and Warden are found in vanilla.mcfunction)


2. To disable a boss from showing displaying their boss bar, simply remove the hashtag situated in front of a command line under the name of the boss they correspond with.

### FOR EXAMPLE:
![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ee30abb96ede7d51bf7206924e9062e5a30ca73.webp)


 

**TIP: Hit the "Ctrl" and "F" keys at the same time to look up specific terms and navigate to where they are located.**








## Recommended resources:
- [Global Packs mod by JTK222](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks)
